texto: [There's] a number of questionable characters whose goal is clearly not to disseminate information, but to prolong their pathetic reign by controlling people through a highly-organized and continued engineering of ignorance.
explicacao: Citação de Marc Vouillot sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “[There's] a number of questionable characters whose goal is clearly not to disseminate informatio…” articula motivacao, domination, ignorance em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como ignorance.
